data.title: Donor Support Powers New $15M Investment in 62 Scientists Tackling Alzheimer’s, Macular Degeneration, and Glaucoma
data.description: In Clarksburg, Md., BrightFocus Foundation disclosed it has allocated $15.2 million in fresh research grants targeting Alzheimer’s disease, macular degeneration, and glaucoma. The organization aims to bolster scientific exploration in light of uncertain federal funding conditions. Notably, $8.5 million is dedicated to the Alzheimer’s Disease Research program, $4.5 million to the Macular Degeneration Research program, and $2.2 million to the National Glaucoma Research program for this year.

data.title: Revolution Medicines to Present Pivotal Phase 3 RASolute 302 Clinical Trial Results for Daraxonrasib in Previously Treated Metastatic Pancreatic Cancer During a Plenary Session at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting
data.description: Revolution Medicines, Inc. based in Redwood City, California, disclosed on April 21, 2026, that they will be sharing comprehensive findings from the Phase 3 RASolute 302 clinical trial at the upcoming American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago. The study focused on evaluating daraxonrasib, a treatment for patients with RAS-addicted cancers, specifically those with previously treated metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). The trial was conducted on a global scale and was randomized. The ASCO Annual Meeting is scheduled to take place from May 29 to June 2, 2026. Revolution Medicines, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol RVMD.

data.title: MyOme Strengthens Board with Appointment of Two Healthcare Leaders
data.description: Menlo Park, California - On April 21, 2026, MyOme, a prominent genomics company specializing in innovation and risk modeling, unveiled the addition of Sam Roosz and Dr. Ravi Thadhani to its Board of Directors. Roosz and Dr. Thadhani, renowned experts in healthcare technology and data, join the board to contribute their extensive knowledge and skills to the company.

data.title: Idaho Advanced Energy Consortium Announces The Release of its Request For Information for Communities Interested in Considering Hosting Advanced Nuclear Projects
data.description: In Idaho Falls, on April 21, 2026, the Idaho Advanced Energy Consortium (IAEC) announced the launch of a Request for Information (RFI) aimed at identifying "First-Mover" communities willing to investigate the advancement of Small Modular Reactor (SMR) technology. The IAEC, a leading facilitator of energy sector groups, is seeking input from interested parties to assess opportunities for developing SMRs. This initiative marks a significant step in fostering collaboration within the energy industry.

data.title: PRESIDENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF ZAMBIA OFFICIATES AT THE LAUNCH OF THE LEOPARDS HILL SOLAR AND BATTERY STORAGE PROJECT
data.description: In Lusaka, Zambia, on April 21, 2026, Globeleq, a prominent independent power producer in Africa, introduced the Leopards Hill project. This initiative marks Zambia's most extensive hybrid renewable energy development. The inauguration took place in the presence of Mr. Hakainde Hichilema, the President of the country.

data.title: Mouser Electronics Empowers Next Generation of Engineers as Registration Sponsor of 2026 FIRST Robotics Championship
data.description: In Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, Mouser Electronics, Inc. confirms ongoing sponsorship of FIRST® Robotics Competition, promoting innovation and skill development in thousands of youth globally. Mouser will sponsor the FIRST Championship, scheduled for April 29 - May 2 at Houston's George R. Brown Convention Center. This event serves as a platform for nurturing innovation among the youth.

data.title: Beko Brings the Future of Kitchen Living to EuroCucina 2026, Converging Legacy, Design and Purpose
data.description: In Milan on April 21, 2026, Beko, a prominent brand in home appliances, has announced their participation in EuroCucina 2026. The event showcases the integration of technology, design, and sustainability in revolutionizing the way we cook and live in our homes. This return to EuroCucina signifies Beko's commitment to innovation in the kitchen space.

data.title: SION POWER TARGETS DRONE WARFARE GAP WITH 500 WH/KG LITHIUM-METAL BATTERIES
data.description: Sion Power, a company specializing in advanced battery technology, has introduced Licerion® Strike™ and Echo™ cells designed for unmanned military systems. These cells boast a significant increase in flight duration, with reported improvements ranging from 2 to 3 times longer than previous models. Additionally, the new cells can accommodate over 50% more payload while achieving a notable 30% reduction in weight. The announcement was made in Tucson, Arizona on April 21, 2026.
